prompt: Our deployment keeps getting blocked by flaky permissions. Sometimes the deploy user can't write to the target directory. Fix the permission issue so deploys stop failing.
We need to add retry logic and circuit breakers to our API client. When downstream services are slow, we want to fail fast rather than wait. Design the resilience pattern.
Our junior developer needs help understanding how to use Python generators and async/await. Can you explain these concepts with examples so they can write better code?
We need to completely rewrite our backend from Node.js to Go for better performance. Design the migration plan including service boundaries, API compatibility, and rollout strategy.
I want to track how many push-ups and miles I run per week and optimize my training schedule. Can you help me design a progressive overload program?
Our engineers need more capability — the team is too small for the work we have. Help me write a hiring plan and job descriptions for 3 new backend engineering positions.
